# Lumière Wellness Studio
> Luxury spa and beauty studio in Dubai Marina, UAE

Lumière Wellness Studio offers premium spa treatments including facials, massages, gold rituals, and nail services in Dubai Marina. Serving high-net-worth residents and tourists in Dubai since 2019.

## Services
- Signature Facials (from AED 580)
- Holistic Massage (from AED 420)
- Gold Body Ritual (from AED 950)
- Nail Atelier (from AED 180)
- Hammam Journey (from AED 680)
- Couple's Retreat (from AED 1,400)

## Location
Dubai Marina Walk, Tower 3, Dubai, UAE

## Contact
WhatsApp: +971-50-000-0000
Email: hello@lumiere-wellness.ae
